events.title: Paul McCartney turns 84
events.blurb: Sir Paul McCartney, legendary singer-songwriter and former Beatle, celebrates his 84th birthday.

angles.name: Macca's Legacy
angles.copy: Eighty-four years young and still making music history. Happy birthday to the one and only Sir Paul McCartney!

events.title: Alison Moyet turns 65
events.blurb: British singer-songwriter Alison Moyet, known for her powerful vocals and work with Yazoo, celebrates her 65th birthday.

angles.name: Moyet's Voice
angles.copy: That incredible voice is 65 today! Wishing a very happy birthday to the incomparable Alison Moyet.

events.title: Lionel Richie turns 77
events.blurb: Grammy-winning artist Lionel Richie, famous for his iconic hits and smooth ballads, celebrates his 77th birthday.

angles.name: Hello, Lionel!
angles.copy: Is it him you're looking for? It's Lionel Richie's 77th birthday! Celebrating a true music icon today.

events.title: Cyndi Lauper turns 73
events.blurb: Iconic American singer Cyndi Lauper, known for her distinctive style and anthems like 'Girls Just Want to Have Fun', celebrates her 73rd birthday.

angles.name: Cyndi's Still Shining
angles.copy: Girls (and boys) still just want to have fun! Happy 73rd birthday to the utterly brilliant Cyndi Lauper.

events.title: George Michael would have been 63
events.blurb: Remembering George Michael, who would have celebrated his 63rd birthday today.

angles.name: Remembering George
angles.copy: Thinking of the incredible George Michael on what would have been his 63rd birthday. His music lives on.

events.title: Anniversary of Michael Jackson's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 17 years since the passing of the King of Pop, Michael Jackson.

angles.name: King of Pop's Legacy
angles.copy: Seventeen years ago today, we lost the King of Pop. Michael Jackson's influence on music and culture remains unmatched.

events.title: Ringo Starr turns 86
events.blurb: The legendary drummer of The Beatles, Ringo Starr, celebrates his 86th birthday.

angles.name: Peace and Love, Ringo
angles.copy: Happy 86th birthday to the one and only Ringo Starr! Sending peace and love to the legendary Beatle.

events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's iconic guitarist and astrophysicist, Sir Brian May, celebrates his 79th birthday.

angles.name: Guitar God May
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the absolute legend that is Brian May! Still rocking the world with that Red Special.

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The charismatic frontman of The Rolling Stones, Mick Jagger, celebrates his 83rd birthday.

angles.name: Jagger's Still Rolling
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young and still the greatest showman on earth. Happy birthday to the one and only Mick Jagger!

events.title: MTV Launched (1981)
events.blurb: 45 years ago today, MTV launched with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first-ever music video.

angles.name: The Day Video Starred
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago, a new channel changed music forever. MTV launched today, with The Buggles kicking things off.

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' (1994)
events.blurb: Today marks 32 years since Oasis released their iconic debut album, 'Definitely Maybe', featuring singles like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Definitely Iconic
angles.copy: Thirty-two years ago, Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your favourite track?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began (1969)
events.blurb: 57 years ago, the legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair began, becoming a pivotal moment in music history and counterculture.

angles.name: Three Days of Peace
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since the summer of love peaked. Remembering the iconic Woodstock Festival, which kicked off today in 1969.

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 49 years since the world lost the King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Forty-nine years today since we said goodbye to Elvis Presley. His music and legacy continue to shake up the world.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 30 years since the tragic death of influential rapper Tupac Shakur.

angles.name: Tupac's Enduring Rhymes
angles.copy: Thirty years today since the music world lost Tupac Shakur. His powerful lyrics and legacy resonate stronger than ever.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's Death
events.blurb: Today marks 56 years since the passing of legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix.

angles.name: Guitar God Remembered
angles.copy: Fifty-six years ago today, we lost a true guitar visionary. Remembering the unparalleled genius of Jimi Hendrix.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' (1969)
events.blurb: Today marks 57 years since The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road', featuring the famous zebra crossing cover.

angles.name: Across The Abbey Road
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years since The Beatles gave us the masterpiece that is 'Abbey Road'. That album cover is still iconic.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The formidable frontwoman of The Pretenders, Chrissie Hynde, celebrates her 75th birthday.

angles.name: Hynde's Power
angles.copy: Seventy-five years strong! Happy birthday to the rock and roll icon, Chrissie Hynde. Still owning every stage.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: The distinctive voice of Oasis and a British rock icon, Liam Gallagher, celebrates his 54th birthday.

angles.name: LG's Birthday
angles.copy: Fifty-four years of pure rock and roll attitude. Happy birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! As you were.

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' (1971)
events.blurb: Today marks 55 years since John Lennon released his timeless anthem for peace, 'Imagine'.

angles.name: Imagine 55 Years
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago, John Lennon gave the world a song that still resonates globally. 'Imagine' was released today.

events.title: Apple launched the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: 25 years ago today, Apple introduced the first iPod, revolutionising how the world listened to music.

angles.name: 25 Years of iPod
angles.copy: Remember '1,000 songs in your pocket'? Twenty-five years ago, Apple unveiled the first iPod, changing music forever.
